headline: BOTH frozen FM encoders STRONGLY encode subject identity (L1 bacc 0.55-0.59 vs 0.04 chance, class-conditional ~= marginal) but it is NOT task-coupled (L4~=0), NOT relied-upon (L5 does not beat variance null), and removing it does not change the target (L6~=0). Architecture-general.
measurability: PASS (L1/L4/L5/L6 all produced with permutation/variance nulls; per-dataset)
open_issue_1_weak_task: task decodable only 0.53-0.55 on 2-class MI (near STOP-5). Likely F0 mean-pool over channels washes out MI C3/C4 lateralization -> L4/L5/L6 (task-coupling) PRELIMINARY; L1 robust.
open_issue_2_determinism: CodeBrain repeat-exact (0.0) but <=2e-3 batch-size numerical path (SGConv FFT-conv); immaterial to 0.55 L1 effect; CBraMod fully deterministic (3e-7).
temporal_token_status: collapsed_confirmed (1 unique code across 1000 SHU trials + canonical 30-patch window; freq codes 4009/4096 diverse; side-check one-time no-tuning; excluded from main analysis; C23)
recommendation: Before 8C: re-dump a SPATIALLY-PRESERVING feature (per-channel: mean over patches only, keep channels) so MI task decodes strongly, then re-run L4/L5/L6 -> makes the not-task-coupled conclusion solid. L1 finding already solid on pooled.
f0_pooled_l4_l5_l6_status: superseded_by_F1 (weak-task confound resolved: F1 recovers MI 0.53->0.60)
headline_final: On a spatially-preserving feature that RECOVERS the MI task (0.60/0.60, gate PASS both), both frozen FM encoders STRONGLY encode subject identity (L1 0.628/0.562 vs 0.04 chance, class-conditional) but do NOT functionally rely on it: subject-subspace erase does not beat a variance-matched erase (L5), and does not change the target (L6~0). Architecture-general. Subject encoding != harmful reliance, on a decodable task.

determinism.f1_audit_comparison: PASS (task d=0.0018, L1 d=0.0025, L4/L5/L6<=0.001, gate+sign unchanged)

bnci2014_001_sanity.verdict: L1 subject-encoding REPLICATES cross-dataset (strong, both encoders); but frozen 4-class 2a task is WEAK (0.27/0.32 vs 0.25 chance) so the task GATE FAILS -> L4/L5/L6 not concludable on BNCI. Recorded as small-subject/weak-frozen-4-class sanity limitation; does NOT rewrite the SHU-MI conclusion. F1 pipeline + channel mapping reproducible on BNCI. No stop rule (SHU-MI is the primary task-coupling result).

proceed_to_8c_note: 8B closure complete, no stop rule; PM authorized 8C execution after clean closure. Next=8C-0 PhysioNetMI manifest.
